Generated from `claude-pack/commands/_my_example_command.md`. This is a command-derived Codex skill. Rebuild it instead of editing it by hand.


This is an example custom command. Replace this content with your own command logic.

Custom commands allow you to create reusable prompt templates that can be invoked with `/command-name`.

## Example Use Cases:
- Code review workflows
- Security audit checklists
- Documentation generation
- Testing procedures
- Deployment checklists
